name: Zarr
description: Unload a barrage of explosives or a huge shot of flak from this cannon’s enormous barrel.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Unload a barrage of explosives or a huge shot of flak from this cannon’s enormous barrel.

components.name: Drakgoon
components.description: The Drakgoon flak cannon sends volleys of intensely hot shrapnel ricocheting around the room. Can be fired in wide or concentrated bursts.

components.name: Kuva
components.description:
Kuva is an exceedingly rare red fluid coveted by the Grineer Queens. It can be obtained in Kuva Missions, and is used to Cycle Rivens or build rare blueprints.

Location: Kuva Siphon Missions and Taveuni (Kuva Fortress)

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Kuva Zarr
Zarr
Kuva Zarr: From 15 to 5
Zarr: From 84 to 60

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.3
Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed reload circle filling instantly for weapons that reload individually (Zarr and Corinth), instead of filling up individually for each round loaded.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Zarr Towsun Skin not properly apply to the "dangles" on the front of the weapon.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect projectile sounds with the Zarr and Knell.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed firing Zarr's Barrage inside Limbo’s Rift disabling Stasis.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes: Javlok, Buzlok, Ferrox, Harpak, Hind, Mutalist Quanta, Penthera, Paracyst, Penta, Quanta (Vandal), Stradavar, Tenora, Zarr

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Zarr’s mini projectiles not sticking to enemies when equipped with Adhesive Blast.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.5.6+19.5.6.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed part of Zarr's muzzle flash showing up in the Arsenal when applying colors.
Fixed some firing effects not showing up for the Zarr.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: 19.1.0 Ash Revisited
patchlogs.changes: You can now change firing modes during reload on the Stradavar and Zarr as per feedback:

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Adhesive Blast causing the Zarr, Penta, Tonkor, Torid, Secura Penta, and Ogris’ projectile sound to not play.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the audio of the Twin Rogga and Zarr.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the 'Adhesive Blast' Mod not working on the Zarr.
Fixed an issue with the Zarr Cluster missiles not projecting in the right direction.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.0.3
patchlogs.changes: The Zarr has received a balance pass:
